mnemonics.title: GPIO Register Order
mnemonics.content: **D**irect **P**roperly, **T**hen **O**perate. (DDR then PORT for output. For AVR: TRIS then LAT for output). Remember Data Direction first, then Output value.

mnemonics.title: Input Fix
mnemonics.content: **F**loating **I**nputs **X**asperate. Always use a Pull-up or Pull-down to give an input a defined state (Fix it!).
